notes: SUN's six-face arcana die. LONG LIGHT is the highest success. GLARE is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The afternoon holds. Advance two.
Success ★. You take it easy. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The oak's shadow comes around. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 GLARE).
Partial. Pepper at your feet. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 GLARE).
Failure. The heat won the round. +1 GLARE.
Wild. ★ if you are under the oak this turn. Otherwise: failure, and the gate looks closer than it was.
